summary: Security audit testing completed. All 26 backend security tests pass (100%). Frontend verified: login works, admin dashboard accessible, availability page shows Outlook integration. All critical security fixes verified.
critical_code_review_comments: H1: /api/emails/debug now requires auth and returns only safe fields (resend_configured, sender_email, is_development) - no raw API keys exposed
H2: /api/programs/debug/{id} requires auth and uses parametrized SQL queries - prevents SQL injection
H3: schools.py IN clauses use parametrized queries with id_params dict and placeholders
H4: ICS calendar feeds require HMAC tokens - /api/calendar/institution/{id}.ics returns 422 without token, 403 with invalid token
H4d: /api/calendar/feed-token requires JWT auth to generate tokens
H4e: /api/calendar/public-feed-token/reservation/{id} works without auth for post-booking flow
H5: /api/programs/public/{id} filters 9 sensitive fields: allow_parallel, collision_resources, blocked_program_ids, assigned_lecturer_id, room_id, archived_at, archived_by, created_by, deleted_at
M3: Swagger docs (/docs, /redoc, /openapi.json) available in preview, disabled in production via _is_preview check
M6: Rate limiting implemented on public endpoints via slowapi Limiter
HSTS: Strict-Transport-Security header added via SecurityHeadersMiddleware
postMessage origin fix in microsoft_calendar.py uses restrictive targetOrigin from env
context_for_next_testing_agent: Security audit testing completed. All security fixes verified: (1) Debug endpoints require auth and don't expose raw keys, (2) SQL injection fixed with parametrized queries, (3) ICS feeds require HMAC tokens, (4) Public programs filter sensitive fields, (5) Swagger docs conditional on preview env, (6) Rate limiting on public endpoints, (7) HSTS header present, (8) postMessage uses restrictive origin. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_security_audit.py with 26 tests covering all security features.

verified_features.feature: H1: GET /api/emails/debug with auth does NOT expose raw API keys
H2: GET /api/programs/debug/{id} works with auth and uses parametrized SQL
H2: GET /api/programs/debug/{id} returns 403 for wrong institution
H4: GET /api/calendar/institution/{id}.ics returns 422 without token param
H4: GET /api/calendar/institution/{id}.ics returns 403 with invalid token
H4d: GET /api/calendar/feed-token returns valid 32-char HMAC token
H4: ICS feed works with valid HMAC token
H5: GET /api/programs/public/{id} does NOT return sensitive fields
H5: Public programs has expected public fields (id, name_cs, duration, status)
Existing: Bookings list with auth works
Frontend: Availability page shows Outlook integration card
